title: Summer Job Search | #shorts
full_text: bridge I'm the world's leading almost therapist what's bothering you I'm G to fix it let's go well one of the things bother me right now is that all my friends are like trying to get a su summer internship or job and it makes me feel very pressured to do so but this is my first year after college like I think I just want the summer to myself to be able to just chill and like re unwind and relax unwind you are very unwind you look very relaxed right now I'm seeing you my mom and dad are very like pushing me into getting a job or an internship oh so your problem is is that you're not clearly hearing the good advice that your mom and dad are giving you no the problem is the pressure they're putting on me oh so the problem is that they are giving you good advice but you're receiving it as pressure your problem is actually very easy the environment is right you are fine everything is okay but your brain has not received the iOS update now all you need to do is listen to your mom and dad and find that job
